jasper.name: Jasper
jasper.blurb: AI writing assistant built for marketing teams and content at scale.
jasper.program_note: Apply at Jasper's official partner program page. Verify current commission terms before publishing.

copyai.name: Copy.ai
copyai.blurb: AI copywriting tool geared toward short-form marketing and sales copy.
copyai.program_note: Apply via Copy.ai's affiliate/partner page. Verify current commission terms.

grammarly.name: Grammarly
grammarly.blurb: Writing assistant for grammar, tone, and clarity, with a generous free tier.
grammarly.program_note: Grammarly runs its affiliate program through a network (historically Impact/Partnerize). Apply and verify current payout structure.

clickup.name: ClickUp
clickup.blurb: All-in-one project management and productivity workspace with AI features.
clickup.program_note: Apply via ClickUp's official affiliate page. Verify current terms.

notion.name: Notion
notion.blurb: Flexible workspace for notes, docs, and project tracking with a built-in AI assistant.
notion.program_note: Apply via Notion's official affiliate/referral program page. Verify current terms.

asana.name: Asana
asana.blurb: Task and project management tool for small-to-large teams.
asana.program_note: Check whether Asana currently runs a public affiliate program before including it live.

surferseo.name: Surfer SEO
surferseo.blurb: Content optimization tool that scores drafts against top-ranking pages.
surferseo.program_note: Apply via Surfer's official affiliate page. Verify current commission rate.

semrush.name: Semrush
semrush.blurb: SEO and competitive research suite used widely by content and marketing teams.
semrush.program_note: Semrush's affiliate program (historically branded BeRush) is well-established. Apply and verify current terms.

ahrefs.name: Ahrefs
ahrefs.blurb: SEO toolset for backlink analysis, keyword research, and site audits.
ahrefs.program_note: Check current affiliate program availability and terms directly with Ahrefs.

synthesia.name: Synthesia
synthesia.blurb: AI video generation platform using synthetic avatars and voiceover.
synthesia.program_note: Apply via Synthesia's official partner program. Verify current terms.

descript.name: Descript
descript.blurb: Audio/video editing tool with AI transcription and script-based editing.
descript.program_note: Apply via Descript's affiliate page. Verify current terms.

pictory.name: Pictory
pictory.blurb: Turns long-form text or video into short, shareable video clips using AI.
pictory.program_note: Apply via Pictory's affiliate program. Verify current terms.

canva.name: Canva
canva.blurb: Design tool with AI-assisted templates for graphics, docs, and presentations.
canva.program_note: Apply via Canva's official affiliate program (runs through Partnerize/Impact historically). Verify current terms.
